subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The letter of the twenty-fourth of Sha'ban of this year, addressed to Áqá Siyyid Asadu'lláh [3.5s]... ...Though ‘Abdu’l-Baha was suffering from three chronic illnesses, and the physicians of Haifa said that it was necessary for him to enjoy peace of mind and tranquility for a while
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه بیست و چهارم شعبان این سنه که به آقا سید اسدالله
subcodes.subjects: @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @unity; oneness of humanity, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @contention and conflict
